***REMOVED***code-point-at [![Build Status](https://travis-ci.org/sindresorhus/code-point-at.svg?branch=master)](https://travis-ci.org/sindresorhus/code-point-at)

> ES2015 [`String#codePointAt()`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/String/codePointAt) [ponyfill](https://ponyfill.com)


#***REMOVED***Install

```
$ npm install --save code-point-at
```


#***REMOVED***Usage

```js
var codePointAt = require('code-point-at');

codePointAt('🐴');
//=> 128052

codePointAt('abc', 2);
//=> 99
```

#***REMOVED***API

##***REMOVED***codePointAt(input, [position])
